name: Google Business Review Automator — Multi-Business v2

assignments.name: promptText
assignments.value:
={{ 'TASK: Write a warm, genuine reply to this Google review for ' + $json.businessName + '.

RULES:
- 2 to 4 sentences only
- Thank the reviewer by first name if available
- Reference at least one specific detail from their review to show you read it
- End with a friendly invitation to return or use the service again
- Write in first-person plural (we / our)
- No hashtags, emojis, or hollow phrases like "We value your feedback"
- Sound like a real person, not a template

REVIEW DETAILS:
Business: ' + $json.businessName + '
Reviewer: ' + $json.reviewerName + '
Rating: ' + $json.starRating + '
Review text: ' + $json.reviewText + '

Write the reply now. Reply text only — no labels, no quotation marks.' }}

assignments.name: promptText
assignments.value:
={{ 'TASK: Write an empathetic, professional reply DRAFT for a ' + ($json.starRatingNum <= 2 ? 'negative' : 'neutral') + ' Google review for ' + $json.businessName + '.

RULES:
- 3 to 5 sentences
- Acknowledge the reviewer's experience sincerely — do not be defensive
- Apologise where it is appropriate
- Invite the reviewer to contact the business directly to resolve the issue
- Do NOT include a phone number, email address, or URL — the owner will add contact details before posting
- Write in first-person plural (we / our)
- Professional, calm, and genuinely empathetic tone
- This is a DRAFT for the owner to review — it will not be auto-posted

REVIEW DETAILS:
Business: ' + $json.businessName + '
Reviewer: ' + $json.reviewerName + '
Rating: ' + $json.starRatingNum + ' stars
Review text: ' + $json.reviewText + '

Write the draft reply now. Reply text only — no labels, no quotation marks.' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ ($('Set Draft Prompt').item.json.starRatingNum <= 2 ? '🔴 Negative' : '🟡 Neutral') + ' Review — ' + $('Set Draft Prompt').item.json.businessName + ' (' + $('Set Draft Prompt').item.json.starRatingNum + '★ from ' + $('Set Draft Prompt').item.json.reviewerName + ')' }}
🚨 Review Automator — Workflow Error
parameters.text:
={{ 'A workflow error occurred.

Time: ' + new Date().toISOString() + '
Last node: ' + $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted + '
Error: ' + $json.error.message + '
Execution ID: ' + $json.execution.id + '

Open n8n to inspect the full execution log.' }}
